2606.12916.title: MDForge: Agentic Molecular Dynamics Pipeline Design under Sparse Simulator Feedback
2606.12916.paper_summary: Molecular dynamics (MD) is the canonical in-silico method for atomistic molecular science, simulating molecular behavior from first-principle physics. Designing an MD pipeline for a new system requires substantial expert knowledge: running it on even one molecule is expensive, ruling out trial-and-error. We automate this expert pipeline-design process with an LLM agent. Unlike existing MD agents that orchestrate a predefined tool set, we treat pipeline design as open-ended code generation in which the agent's behavior is reshaped online by verbal reward. Specifically, we build MDForge, an LLM agent whose in-context update rule densifies the sparse reward via a multi-agent debate among physics experts. On three SAMPL host-guest binding free-energy benchmarks, MDForge automatically designs MD pipelines competitive with human experts. Deployed on a library of unseen candidate guests, its CB[7] pipeline discovers a novel binder that wet-lab competition NMR confirms is a high-affinity, picomolar CB[7] binder. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/Zehong-Wang/MDForge.
2606.12916.paper_summary_zh: 分子動力學（MD）是原子分子科學的經典計算方法，從第一原理物理學模擬分子的行為。為新系統設計MD流程需要大量專業知識：即使在一個分子上運行也很昂貴，排除了試錯法。我們通過一個LLM代理自動化這一專家流程設計過程。與現有的MD代理協調預定的工具集不同，我們將流程設計視為開放式代碼生成，其中代理的行為通過口頭獎勵在線重塑。具體而言，我們構建了MDForge，一個LLM代理，其上下文更新規則通過物理專家之間的多代理辯論來密集稀疏獎勵。在三個SAMPL主客體結合自由能基準上，MDForge自動設計的MD流程與人類專家相媲美。在一個未見候選客體的庫中部署後，其CB[7]流程發現了一種新型結合劑，濕實驗競爭NMR確認這是一種高親和力的皮摩爾CB[7]結合劑。我們的數據和代碼可在https://github.com/Zehong-Wang/MDForge獲得。
2606.12916.author: Zehong Wang et.al.
2606.12916.authors: Zehong Wang, Yijun Ma, Connor R. Schmidt, Tianyi Ma, Weixiang Sun, Ziming Li, Xiaoguang Guo, Chuxu Zhang, Matthew J. Webber, Yanfang Ye
